records.ptx_feature: PTX ISA 7.0 minimum; CUDA 13.3 emits PTX 9.3

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR side-effecting inline PTX cp.async.ca.shared.global with l,l,~{memory}
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM retained the exact four-byte cache-all copy in the combined classic cp.async production example and produced 8,052-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 e048104e8dac3507a23165041436116c2d0a696f0939df71663c5c6dbced1199).

stages.representation: retained combined classic cp.async kernel
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 nvJitLink produced a 7,712-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 91e7704506ae29972952a49c14621ef1246e4144619066b489c622fb6782d5ae); cuobjdump showed all eight LDGSTS copy forms and the LDGDEPBAR/DEPBAR control sequence.
